mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course (name, credit, hours, semester, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{credit}, #{hours}, #{semester}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, credit, hours, semester, create_time, update_time FROM course
SELECT id, name, credit, hours, semester, create_time, update_time FROM course WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, credit, hours, semester, create_time, update_time FROM course WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
SELECT id, name, credit, hours, semester, create_time, update_time FROM course WHERE credit = #{credit}
SELECT id, name, credit, hours, semester, create_time, update_time FROM course WHERE semester = #{semester}

SELECT c.id AS courseId, c.name AS courseName, c.credit, COUNT(sc.id) AS studentCount, ROUND(AVG(sc.score), 2) AS avgScore, MAX(sc.score) AS maxScore, MIN(sc.score) AS minScore, SUM(CASE WHEN sc.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passCount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN sc.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(sc.id), 2) AS passRate FROM course c LEFT JOIN score sc ON sc.course_id = c.id WHERE c.id = #{courseId} GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.credit
